mapper.select: /* 챗봇가이드 인사멘트 조회 chatGuide.selectChatGuideGreetingList */ SELECT A.GUIDE_ID , A.GUIDE_TP_CD , A.GUIDE_KEY , A.ENBL_YN , A.CONTENT , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_CHAT_GUIDE A WHERE 1=1 AND A.GUIDE_TP_CD = '001'

/* 챗봇가이드 안내멘트 조회 chatGuide.selectChatGuideNoticeList */ SELECT A.GUIDE_ID , A.GUIDE_TP_CD , A.GUIDE_KEY , A.ENBL_YN , A.CONTENT , A.DSPL_COND , A.MODIFY_DT , A.AUTO_DETECT_YN FROM TB_CHAT_GUIDE A WHERE 1=1 AND A.GUIDE_TP_CD = '002'

/* 챗봇가이드 오류메시지 조회 chatGuide.selectChatGuideErrorMessageList */ SELECT A.GUIDE_ID , A.GUIDE_TP_CD , A.GUIDE_KEY , A.ENBL_YN , A.CONTENT , A.MAX_CHARS , A.MODIFY_DT FROM TB_CHAT_GUIDE A WHERE 1=1 AND A.GUIDE_TP_CD = '003'

/* 챗봇가이드 점검/장애 조회 chatGuide.selectChatGuideMaintenanceList */ SELECT A.GUIDE_ID , A.GUIDE_TP_CD , A.GUIDE_KEY , A.TITLE , A.ENBL_YN , A.CONTENT , A.START_DT , A.END_DT , A.ADVANCE_NOTICE_CD , C.CODE_NM AS ADVANCE_NOTICE_NM , A.MODIFY_DT , A.AUTO_DSPL_YN FROM TB_CHAT_GUIDE A LEFT JOIN TB_CODE C ON C.CODE_GRP_ID = 'GI0000002' AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' AND C.CODE_ID = A.ADVANCE_NOTICE_CD WHERE 1=1 AND A.GUIDE_TP_CD = '004'
